'''vadudhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xiebaisaponin|xiebaisaponin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-d-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xiebaisaponin|xiebaisaponin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| vadudhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vædidhith|vædidhith]] || [[word:vædidhij|vædidhij]] || [[word:vædidhish|vædidhish]] || [[word:vædidhi|vædidhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vadududhuth|vadududhuth]] || [[word:vadududhuj|vadududhuj]] || [[word:vadududhush|vadududhush]] || [[word:vadududhu|vadududhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vadudhuth|vadudhuth]] || [[word:vadudhuj|vadudhuj]] || [[word:vadudhush|vadudhush]] || [[word:vadudhu|vadudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vadufdhuth|vadufdhuth]] || [[word:vadufdhuj|vadufdhuj]] || [[word:vadufdhush|vadufdhush]] || [[word:vadufdhuf|vadufdhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vadudhuthu|vadudhuthu]] || [[word:vadudhuju|vadudhuju]] || [[word:vadudhushu|vadudhushu]] || [[word:vadudhuku|vadudhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vadudhuth|vadudhuth]] || [[word:vadudhuj|vadudhuj]] || [[word:vadudhush|vadudhush]] || [[word:vadudhu|vadudhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vadudhuthul|vadudhuthul]] || [[word:vadudhujul|vadudhujul]] || [[word:vadudhushul|vadudhushul]] || [[word:vadudhukul|vadudhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vadudhuthuthu|vadudhuthuthu]] || [[word:vadudhujuju|vadudhujuju]] || [[word:vadudhushushu|vadudhushushu]] || [[word:vadudhuku|vadudhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vadudhuthun|vadudhuthun]] || [[word:vadudhujun|vadudhujun]] || [[word:vadudhushun|vadudhushun]] || [[word:vadudhukun|vadudhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vadudhuthuoro|vadudhuthuoro]] || [[word:vadudhujuoro|vadudhujuoro]] || [[word:vadudhushuoro|vadudhushuoro]] || [[word:vadudhukuoro|vadudhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
